general.title: Hierarchical Heatmap [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Generates a hierarchical clustering heatmap with dendrograms, where features are assumed to be columns and annotations are rows, grouping cells by annotation and calculating average expression intensities for each feature. \
For color maps definitions, refer to this page \
Please refer to DUET Documentation and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Annotation
parameters.description: Annotation to visualize in the heatmap.

parameters.name: Table to Visualize
parameters.description: Source table to perform the visualization. Default is Original, referring to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Feature Dendrogram
parameters.description: If True, a dendrogram based on the feature will be generated.

parameters.name: Annotation Dendrogram
parameters.description: If True, a dendrogram based on the annotation will be generated.

parameters.name: Z Score
parameters.description: Specifies the axis for z-score normalization. Can be "feature" or "annotation" or "None". Default is "None".

parameters.name: Swap Axes
parameters.description: By default (when False), annotations are on the vertical axis (rows) and features are on the horizontal axis (columns). When set to True, features will be on the vertical axis and annotations on the horizontal axis.

parameters.name: Feature(s)
parameters.description: Need Swap Axes to be True, otherwise will always return all features. List of feature name(s) (e.g., markers) to be included in the visualization. If All, all features are used. Default is All.

parameters.name: Rotate Label
parameters.description: If True, rotate x-axis labels by 45 degrees. Default is False.

parameters.name: Figure DPI
parameters.description: Higher the DPI, clearer the image.

parameters.name: Matrix Plot Ratio
parameters.description: 0~1, the image size of matrix plot in the figure.

parameters.name: Standard Scale
parameters.description: Whether to standard scale data (0: row-wise or 1: column-wise). Default is None.

parameters.name: Horizontal Dendrogram Display Ratio
parameters.description: The ratio of plotting space for the horizontal dendrogram. Range from 0 to 1, default is 0.2.

parameters.name: Vertical Dendrogram Display Ratio
parameters.description: The ratio of plotting space for the vertical dendrogram. Range from 0 to 1, default is 0.2.

parameters.name: Value Min
parameters.description: The minimum value of the color bar.

parameters.name: Value Max
parameters.description: The maximum value of the color bar.

parameters.name: Color Map
parameters.description: Color map to be used in the figure. Check: https://matplotlib.org/stable/users/explain/colors/colormaps.html
